text:
VALUES: MMDDYYYY (e.g., 11/28/2006) 

COMMENT: This variable (the store open date) is missing for 72% of the pharmacies, and a default of date of 
1/1/1990 may appear when the date was not specified; this is self-reported data from pharmacies. 

Additional details regarding the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) source data 
are available at: http://dataq.ncpdp.org/.
